title: rubus schummelii f. hansenii
intro: Rubus schummelii f. hansenii, also known as the Schumel's raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known species of the Rubus genus, a group of flowering plants in the rose family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus schummelii f. hansenii are said to include its ability to aid in digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared through herbal preparations such as infusions, teas, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
